raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "IRT 3PL parameters", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may not be calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Verify calibration of IRT 3PL parameters from real data to ensure accurate assessment results"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "Question pool size", "issue": "Some competencies may have fewer than 15 questions, potentially impacting assessment reliability", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size for affected competencies to at least 15 questions"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "No apparent bias detected in questions against AZ/CIS test-takers", "recommended_fix": "Continue monitoring DIF analysis results to ensure fairness and equity in assessments"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be optimal, potentially affecting assessment accuracy", "recommended_fix": "Review and refine CAT stopping rules to ensure optimal assessment outcomes"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "Temporal decay rationale", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based, potentially impacting assessment validity", "recommended_fix": "Investigate and refine temporal decay rationale to ensure evidence-based assessment practices"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may not be calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Verify calibration of IRT 3PL parameters from real data to ensure accurate assessment results

findings.issue: Some competencies may have fewer than 15 questions, potentially impacting assessment reliability
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size for affected competencies to at least 15 questions

findings.issue: No apparent bias detected in questions against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Continue monitoring DIF analysis results to ensure fairness and equity in assessments

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be optimal, potentially affecting assessment accuracy
findings.recommended_fix: Review and refine CAT stopping rules to ensure optimal assessment outcomes

findings.issue: 180-day half-life may not be evidence-based, potentially impacting assessment validity
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate and refine temporal decay rationale to ensure evidence-based assessment practices
